caption: A news segment features a split-screen layout showing a man in a white traditional outfit and a matching cap sitting in a room with red furniture and curtains. Next to him is a smaller inset window showing a man in a red traditional cap and white attire. Text overlays identify the man in the inset as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS," under the header "ON THE PHONE." A banner at the bottom of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU," with a "SUBSCRIBE" call to action and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA" or "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE." A colorful logo appears in the top left corner of the main scene. Throughout the sequence, the individuals remain in their respective positions, and the on-screen graphics stay largely consistent, though the YouTube URL varies slightly in the final frame.
